setDissolveDelayModal.title: Set dissolve delay for {{neuronId}}
setDissolveDelayModal.description: Dissolve delay is the minimum amount of time you have to wait for the neuron to unlock, and ICPs to be available again. Note, that dissolve delay only decreases when the neuron is in a dissolving state.
setDissolveDelayModal.hint: Minimum {{min}} days to have voting power, maximum {{max}} days.

errors.decreasingDelay: The dissolve delay cannot be decreased.

stakeNeuron.label: How many ICP to stake
stakeNeuron.tooltip: This ICP amount will be staked from your balance.
